name: prforge-local-watch
description: Watches local PRForge repo/session state: git drift, dirty worktree, review updates, test status, approval integrity, branch upstream, hook health, context pressure. Runs on every PRForge session.

name: prforge-distributed-worker-watch
description: Watches distributed worker state: assigned jobs, lease renewal, coordinator directives, revision jobs from audit loop. Runs on worker nodes in distributed mode.

name: prforge-distributed-coordinator-watch
description: Watches distributed coordinator state: worker heartbeats, queue depth, stale leases, signoff state, auditor verdicts, reviewer update dispatch. Runs on coordinator/auditor nodes.
